__note: MASTER content for /about.html, extracted losslessly from src/pages/about.astro (extraction spike). HTML-bearing strings are stored verbatim (entities included) and rendered via set:html. {phone} is interpolated from consts.ts PHONE_DISPLAY (§6.8 — numbers never live in translatable copy).

page.title: About Bret Swope | AltaMedicare
page.description: Meet Bret Swope, founder of AltaMedicare and licensed Utah Medicare guide. Educational, no-pressure Medicare help based in Orem, serving all of Utah.

header.ledeHtml: Founder of AltaMedicare and your local Utah Medicare guide. Here's a little about who I am and why I do this work.

whyHtml: I started AltaMedicare because I watched too many people in my own community struggle to make sense of Medicare. They’d get bombarded with mailers, called by out-of-state agents who didn’t know Utah, and pressured into plans that didn’t actually fit their lives.

My approach is different. I take the time to understand your situation, explain Medicare in plain English, and walk you through your options — without pushing you toward any particular plan. If a Medicare Supplement makes more sense for you than Medicare Advantage, I’ll tell you. If your current plan is already a good fit, I’ll tell you that too.
expectItemsHtml: An educational first. I want you to actually understand your options, not just sign something.
Local Utah knowledge. I know which doctors, hospitals, and pharmacies are in which networks — because I live here too.
No pressure, ever. If you need time to think, take time. If you want to bring a family member, please do.
Annual reviews. Plans change every year. I check in each fall to make sure yours still fits.
Help year-round. If you have a billing question in March or a prescription issue in July, I’m here.
body.missionHtml: To make Medicare feel less confusing, less stressful, and less expensive for Utah families — one honest conversation at a time.

callout.heading: Want to chat?
callout.textHtml: There’s no cost, no obligation, and no high-pressure pitch. Just a real conversation about your Medicare options. Call {phone} or schedule a time that works for you.

cta.textHtml: One free, no-pressure call — clear answers, no sales pitch.
